visible_agent_inputs.summary_1:
First-hop evidence: Community (TV series) — "Community is an American television sitcom created by Dan Harmon." (Passage 4). Community (TV series) — "aired on NBC and Yahoo! Screen from September 17, 2009 to June 2, 2015." (Passage 4).

Bridge needed: The exact title of the fourth episode (Season 1, Episode 4) of Community — the episode title must be verified.

Retrieval direction:
1. Fetch the page titled "List of Community episodes" and inspect the Season 1 episode table for episode number 4 (Title column and air date). 
2. If that page is unavailable, fetch "Community (TV series)" and check the 'Episodes' or 'Season 1' section / episode list table for Episode 4.

current_output.query: Fetch the Wikipedia page "List of Community episodes" and return the Season 1 episode table row for episode number 4: provide the episode title (and air date). If that page is unavailable, fetch the "Community (TV series)" Wikipedia page and extract Season 1 Episode 4 title (and air date).

retrieved_doc_snippets: List of Video on Trial episodes | This is a guide for the MuchMusic TV series "Video on Trial". Data on jurors, air dates, accused videos and verdicts per episode can be found on each season's article page. Links to each season's article page are given under the section of the season.

List of Bump in the Night episodes | This is an episode guide to the US Claymation television series "Bump in the Night". 65 segments were produced, with some segments in season two being repeats of some produced and aired in season one. Below is a list of episode titles, air dates, and some characters featured in each episode.

List of Blue Dragon episodes | This episode list covers the "Blue Dragon" anime episodes to date. The anime was originally scheduled to run for 51 episodes, but was extended into a second season. Starting April 5, 2008, the second season Blue Dragon, titled Blue Dragon Tenkai no Shichiryū (BLUE DRAGON 天界の七竜 , lit. Blue Dragon: The Seven Dragons of Heaven ) , began airing on TV Tokyo.

List of My Wife and Kids episodes | The following is a page of episodes for the television sitcom, "My Wife and Kids". The series aired on ABC from March 28, 2001 to May 17, 2005 with a total of 123 episodes produced spanning 5 seasons.

List of Black Jack Justice episodes | This is a list of episodes of the radio drama series "Black Jack Justice" by Decoder Ring Theatre. The episodes are divided by season and listed by the release date. Each entry includes the number of the show, its title, a short description of the episode, and its original release date.

List of Red Panda Adventures episodes | This is a list of the episodes of the radio drama series The Red Panda Adventures by "Decoder Ring Theater". The episodes are divided by season and listed by the release date. Each entry includes the number of the show, its title, a short description of the episode, and its original release date.

List of De Club van Sinterklaas episodes | This page contains a list of episodes of the Dutch TV series "De Club van Sinterklaas". Episodes were first aired by Fox Kids (1999, 2001-2004), Jetix (2005-2008) and RTL 4 (2009). The series has also spun a theatrical series.
